description: Cursor often injects only .cursor/skills in the available_skills block. This repo also maintains project skills under .github/skills (e.g. planning, mulch, guardrails, session). An agent answered planning/spec questions without those files because nothing auto-triggered them.
resolution: Do not treat injected skills as exhaustive: glob **/SKILL.md, .github/skills/**, and .cursor/skills/** before concluding a capability is missing. When the user asks for something and it is not in context, say so and ask whether it may live under .github (skills, workflows), .cursor/rules, AGENTS.md, or elsewhere—and offer to copy or migrate into .cursor for Cursor continuity (see Beads coreai-na7). For planning and Beads↔spec work, read docs/planning/beads-mvp-alignment-v3.md and docs/planning/index.md; link tasks with bd update --external-ref docs/specs/....
